result.summary: Found several visual issues, mainly horizontal clipping/overflow and an inconsistent active navigation state.

issues.description: Several elements are clipped off the right edge of the viewport, including the 'Hot Games' category tab and the rightmost game tiles in each row. This makes the page look horizontally overflowing or improperly sized for mobile.
issues.suggestion: Constrain content to the viewport width, use a clear horizontal carousel treatment with proper padding/snap behavior, or reduce the number/width of visible cards on mobile.

issues.description: The bottom navigation highlights 'POKER' as the active tab, while the visible page content appears to be the Casino/Home game lobby and the top navigation highlights 'Home'. This creates a confusing mismatch in navigation state.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the active bottom navigation item matches the current page or section, likely highlighting 'CASINO' instead of 'POKER' on this screen.

issues.description: The bottom fixed navigation overlaps the lower game grid area, with the last visible row partially hidden behind the nav bar.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the scrollable page content equal to or greater than the fixed nav height so content is not obscured.

issues.description: The carousel/banner arrow controls sit very close to the screen edges and appear partially clipped, especially the left arrow.
issues.suggestion: Add horizontal inset spacing for carousel controls or keep them fully inside the banner bounds.
